name: Loved you all <3
description:
Hey everyone.
I'm ready to leave now, but I can't stay silent anymore.

There are things I witnessed as a moderator that I can't stand by or ignore. I tried to believe things would improve, but at some point, staying quiet felt worse than speaking up.

Everything I have to say is in the bot's first message.
You're free to read it, share it, or save it while it's available.

I genuinely loved this community and a lot of the people in it.

Take care of yourselves. ❤️

Update: I clarified one point that I worded poorly and that might not have come across the way I intended. When I mention that we were told to ban a certain type of content only if it was very bad, I'm referring specifically to banning the account. Any underage bot was always removed. When I say "ban," I mean banning the entire account that posted the bot.

Update 2: I honestly didn't expect this to get so much attention. I'm genuinely touched by your support, even if we don't know each other or if you've only seen me wearing the "bad cop" hat, haha. I'm a shy little guy, so I wanted to thank you all here directly, it's easier for me than replying to every comment. I'm honestly feeling much better about leaving now, and I have support around me ^^ Making bots has been a hobby of mine for a while, and I'll have more free time now to start anew and go back to what I initially loved. Once again, thank you everyone! Even with all the bad stuff, I truly hope you'll all do what you want and what really matters to you. ❤️

Update 3: We do have a Discord server in case everything gets removed (my post and devs' answer to this situation), feel free to join! https://discord.gg/Sua2hRnH
creator: Mikale
